title: Garlicky German Beef Flank Steak Bauernfristück
description: A hearty and flavorful weeknight German dish featuring a garlicky crumbly beef flank steak with a side of savory bhuna sauce. This recipe is a perfect example of a traditional German comfort food, easy to prepare and cook in no time.
instructions: Season the beef flank steak with salt and black pepper. Dredge the steak in flour, shaking off excess.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the beef flank steak for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Remove the steak from the skillet and set aside. Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and caraway seeds to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the bhuna sauce and bring the mixture to a simmer. Return the beef flank steak to the skillet and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Slice the beef flank steak against the grain and serve with the savory bhuna sauce.
Serve with your choice of sides, such as mashed potatoes or roasted vegetables.
